torch_pattern:
x = input_tensor.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)
x = torch.nn.functional.group_norm(x.float(), num_groups, weight.float(), bias.float(), eps=epsilon)
output = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)
weight_transform: Channels-last layout: input is NHWC (often reshaped to [N,1,H*W,C]). Gamma/beta are distributed across cores along channel dim: weight = weight.reshape((num_cores_across_channel, -1))[:, :C // num_cores_across_channel].flatten(); same for bias. num_cores_across_channel derived from memory_layout (HEIGHT_SHARDED->1, BLOCK/WIDTH-> core_grid dim per shard orientation). An input_mask tensor must be created via ttnn.create_group_norm_input_mask(C, num_groups, core_grid.x, ttnn.DataType.BFLOAT8_B).
applicability_notes: Input must be channels-last and is typically reshaped to [batch, 1, H*W, C] before the call. Input often must be bfloat16 (typecast applied at call sites). On Blackhole, use_welford can cause PCC drop; use_welford gated on reciprocals_tensor presence. Output memory_config typically equals input memory_config (sharded).

placement_observations.source: unit_test: input_tensor = ttnn.to_memory_config(input_tensor, sharded_mem_config) with TensorMemoryLayout.HEIGHT_SHARDED, BufferType.L1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large activation (VAE/UNet feature maps, e.g. up_blocks)
placement_observations.source: call_site: stable-diffusion resnet block — ttnn.move(hidden_states) / reallocate before group_norm to defragment L1 for large up_block tensors

memory_config.layout: INTERLEAVED -> resharded to expected sharded config

placement_observations.size_descriptor: mask of shape derived from (C, num_groups, core_grid.x)
placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.create_group_norm_input_mask(C, num_groups, core_grid.x, ttnn.DataType.BFLOAT8_B) then to_device
